experiments_proposed.name: mes-live-regime-labeling-fix
experiments_proposed.rationale: The MES live-labeling gap (3384/3588 mes-5m-v2 rows unlabeled; mes-5m-yz 0/2236 labeled) blinds RG4 on the entire MES multi-symbol fleet -- the single biggest blocker to multi-symbol vol-gating.
experiments_proposed.input_changes: Ensure the live regime row writer attaches regime_label for MES the way it does for BTC/ETH/SOL (which label cleanly, unlab=5); likely a per-symbol market_features freshness / realized-regime-join gap.
experiments_proposed.expected_metric_signal: MES shadow rows show unlab~=0 like BTC/ETH so RG4 scores the full stream, not ~6%% of it.
experiments_proposed.next_step: Trace src.runtime.regime_bar_scoring + the realized-regime label join for MES; cross-ref MB-20260626-001 finding #1 + BL-20260628-XA-TRAINING-ZERO.

experiments_proposed.name: stage-guard-regime-demote-on-rg4
experiments_proposed.rationale: Align the DEMOTE side of the lifecycle with the Option-A gate redesign so the advisory regime head isn't mechanically demoted on the trade-win axis (filed MB-20260630-001).
experiments_proposed.input_changes: ml stage-guard advisory-degradation trigger for regime-family heads gates on RG4 live-regime-discrimination collapse, not brier_lift(score vs win).
experiments_proposed.expected_metric_signal: stage-guard returns hold (not demote) for btc-regime-15m-lgbm-v2 while RG4>=0.55.
experiments_proposed.next_step: PR ml/promotion stage-guard: branch the demote trigger by model family (regime -> RG4; decision/outcome -> trade-win).
